hero.title:
Building Intergenerational Connections
and Strengthening Community Resilience
hero.description: ECAA exists to serve, connect, and empower the Ethiopian community in Atlanta while helping preserve Ethiopian cultural heritage and support integration into American society.
hero.trustCue: Serving the Ethiopian community in Atlanta through connection, culture, and support.
hero.imageAlt: Community members gathered in Atlanta for the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta.
